case_title: DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. NCR CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NCR CONSTRUCTION EAST BAY FLOOR COVERING $73,923.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $73,923.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
